text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer and I are on our way home from a
race, when...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
There's a bunch of people up ahead... You think
there's a sale or something?

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: Don't let this opportunity pass you by! Why don't you give it a go? Yes, you, with your hair tied back!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, a raffle! It's not like I can say no if you're
asking! Let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You bet I do! I got one when I paid at the driving
range earlier.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I'm like one of those people that needs to have all my tickets and point cards on me at all times. Haha...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Such mundane, everyday habits like that may not
be typical of a noble lady, but they're very much
typical of Mejiro Palmer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Let's pull the lever together! Hold on tight!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Time to get this party started! Gimme a good
one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Excited, Mejiro Palmer and I spin the lever
together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
A-a hot spring?! No waaay! I really got the grand
prize?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh wow! I didn't think getting hyped would
actually get me the hot spring party.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Uh-oh, the party vibes in me are getting out of
hand! I need to caaaalm down. Breathe iiin, and
ouuut...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah, thanks... I'm super happy, but I also feel,
like, kinda pressured now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
If I'm gonna go, I've gotta do it right. Now I gotta
look up stuff about the area, make an itinerary...
choice_data_list: You don't need to do all that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I... don't? But whenever the Mejiro family goes
out, I practically always do all the prep work...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's not going to be able to relax if she does all
that. So...
choice_data_list:
You're banned from doing any logistical work.
Your only job there will be to have fun.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, you mean I can just be no work, all play?!
Huh, that's pretty lit. But... can I really?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I mean, I've always done something for these kinda outings, so I don't think I'm gonna be able to just sit back...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I've gotta do something so I don't feel guilty at
least... Oh, I've got it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
How about I make the trip a reward for myself if I
do well in the Twinkle Series? I think I can kick
back in that case.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Then it's a plan! I'll work really hard so I can have
a hot spring party afterward!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Aw yeah! Now I'm getting hyped again! All riiiight!
Let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer is burning with motivation. Now she
has something great to aim for after her big
runaway!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oooh! What a get! Looks juicy!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
This hamburger steak looks good, but the sauce
that comes with it looks a little rich for my blood.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: You think it's okay if I season it myself?
choice_data_list: How about putting some salt on it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I could... but just salt might be kinda bland.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oh, I know! Let me use your kitchen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: If you're down, I'll be our chef tonight!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Sizzle!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Finiiished! Here, try some. I just seasoned it with
some soy sauce and onions.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: At her insistence, I take a bite...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: So? How is it?
choice_data_list: It's got a very refreshing flavor! I like it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Haha! Right?! It's nothing fancy, but it's pretty
healthy since it's low in sodium.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Guess I'll have some too. I made some rice and
soup too, so help yourself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer turns her deluxe hamburger steak
into a full-course impromptu dinner party.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oooh, that's not bad! Look how many we got!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hm... I would've brought a cart or something if I
knew we'd be getting all this.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
No, I mean a golf cart. It'd be way easier to bring
all these back to the dorm if we had one with us.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Not like I have a golf cart or a car, though. You
can bet I'd be going on drives all the time if I did.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Well, no use sitting here daydreaming about
shoulda, woulda, couldas. I'll just have to carry
them myself!
choice_data_list: I'll help! We can both carry them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You sure? I'm the type to just do everything
myself...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But if you're offering, I guess I'll take you up on it.
Let's carry them together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We carry the carrots back to my office and
decide to cook them one by one.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Chomp! Hm... Mm...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Mmm! These taste so sweet and delicious!
Especially after working so hard to carry them
over here!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You eat up too, Trainer! You've gotta be paid
properly for your work.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She insists, so I try one. Just as Mejiro Palmer
said, it tastes extra delectable after doing all that
heavy lifting.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the third
prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Awww, just one? I thought we put some good
energy into it, though.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Welp, whatever. Carrots are lucky vegetables in
my eyes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Just take a close look. What does the shape
remind you of?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, you guessed it! It's a rocket! And a rocket
signifies a rocket start.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I tend to win my races by bursting out the gates
like a rocket and then slaying with my runaway.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Not a bad way to look at it, right?! That's what I
call positive thinking!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Let's eat it on the way home.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The prize is nothing to write home about, but
Mejiro Palmer doesn't seem too bothered about
it.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Whoa... No way...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer... There's only one thing to do in
times like these.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
When you're confronted with a reality you just
can't handle, all you gotta do is...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Run awaaaaay! I saw nothing! Nothing! I don't
accept it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: No tissues here! Nothiiing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She claims not to have seen anything, but Mejiro
Palmer still looks rather upset.
